summary: Plan-only PR remediation assessment for five hydrated open PRs. Recommend #95242 as the only merge candidate because the hydrated artifact shows a narrow cron fix, current passing checks/proof, no hydrated review comments, and security cleared. Recommend a replacement/repair fix artifact for #50177 because it is a small useful contributor PR with maintainer modification allowed but unresolved bot findings and failing proof/checks. Keep the two maintainer draft PRs independent, and route #87300 to human decision because it is broad, unstable, targets develop, and is waiting on author.

actions.reason: Narrow contributor PR needs repair before merge.
Executable narrow repair artifact is available for a useful contributor PR.
Open a credited repair PR only after the executor validates the fix artifact.
Draft maintainer-owned PR is independently useful but not merge-ready and not an autonomous repair target.
Draft maintainer-owned parked cleanup is not merge-ready and should remain outside this remediation shard.
Maintainer decision needed on whether to continue, split, or decline a broad feature PR that is unstable, targets develop, and is waiting on author.

needs_human: #87300 requires a maintainer product/scope decision: broad Control UI model-selector replacement, base develop, unstable checks, failed proof, and waiting on author.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair the useful contributor PR #50177 by preserving its slash-menu clipping fix while addressing remaining review-bot blockers: scope active slash-menu lookup to the rendered chat instance, clean the input wrapper markup/indentation, and validate slash-menu behavior. If direct branch repair is unavailable during execution, open a replacement fix PR that credits RickyTong1 and source PR #50177.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(webchat): keep slash menu visible and scoped
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair the webchat slash-command menu overflow fix from #50177 while preserving contributor credit.
- Scope active slash-menu item lookup to the current chat render root instead of using a global document query.
- Keep keyboard navigation scroll behavior and clean up the composer wrapper markup/styles.

## Credit
Thanks @RickyTong1 for the source PR and root-cause fix in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50177. This Clownfish repair carries that work forward with attribution.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Source PR #50177 by RickyTong1 identified the slash menu overflow clipping root cause and added keyboard scroll handling.
Replacement PR body must explicitly credit RickyTong1 and link https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50177.
If a user-facing changelog entry is added, attribution should mention the source PR contribution.
needs_human: #87300 requires a maintainer product/scope decision: broad Control UI model-selector replacement, base develop, unstable checks, failed proof, and waiting on author.
